mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TC_AUTH_GROUP_MENU WHERE MENU_CD = #{menuCd} AND GROUP_CD = #{groupCd}
SELECT ma.*, m.* FROM TC_AUTH_GROUP_MENU ma INNER JOIN TC_MENU m ON ma.MENU_CD = m.MENU_CD WHERE ma.GROUP_CD = #{groupCd} ORDER BY m.MENU_SORT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TC_AUTH_GROUP_MENU ( MENU_CD, GROUP_CD, AUTH_CREATE_YN, AUTH_UPDATE_YN, AUTH_READ_YN, AUTH_DELETE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{menuCd}, #{groupCd}, #{authCreateYn}, #{authUpdateYn}, #{authReadYn}, #{authDeleteYn}, #{regId}, #{modId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT m.MENU_CD as menuCd, m.MENU_NM as menuNm, m.MENU_LINK as menuLink, MAX(ma.AUTH_CREATE_YN) as authCreateYn, MAX(ma.AUTH_READ_YN) as authReadYn, MAX(ma.AUTH_UPDATE_YN) as authUpdateYn, MAX(ma.AUTH_DELETE_YN) as authDeleteYn, m.MENU_DESC as menuDesc, m.MENU_LEVEL as menuLevel, m.MENU_SORT as menuSort, m.PRNT_MENU_CD as prntMenuCd, m.USE_YN as useYn FROM TC_AUTH_GROUP_USER userAuth LEFT JOIN TC_AUTH_GROUP_MENU ma ON userAuth.GROUP_CD = ma.GROUP_CD INNER JOIN TC_MENU m ON ma.MENU_CD = m.MENU_CD WHERE userAuth.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY m.MENU_CD, m.MENU_NM, m.MENU_LINK, m.MENU_DESC, m.MENU_LEVEL, m.MENU_SORT, m.PRNT_MENU_CD ORDER BY m.MENU_LEVEL ASC, m.MENU_SORT ASC
